mapper.sql: id, requester_user_id as requesterUserId, addressee_user_id as addresseeUserId, status, requested_at as requestedAt, responded_at as respondedAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select: select from friendships where status = #{status} and (requester_user_id = #{userId} or addressee_user_id = #{userId}) order by responded_at desc, id desc
select from friendships where addressee_user_id = #{addresseeUserId} and status = #{status} order by requested_at desc, id desc
select from friendships where requester_user_id = #{requesterUserId} and status = #{status} order by requested_at desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into friendships (requester_user_id, addressee_user_id, status, requested_at, created_at) values (#{requesterUserId}, #{addresseeUserId}, #{status}, #{requestedAt}, current_timestamp)
mapper.update: update friendships set status = #{status}, responded_at = #{respondedAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
